message:
fix(proptest): replace prop_assume! with non-ESC byte strategy in simd_scan test (wa-1u90p.7.1)

The no_esc_means_zero_density test was failing with "Too many global
rejects" because prop_assume!(!data.contains(&0x1b)) filtered out
nearly all random byte vectors of length 2000. Replace with a dedicated
arb_non_esc_bytes strategy that generates bytes excluding 0x1b directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
